name: haven-os
description: A self-hosted home for one person and their AI companion — one Cloudflare Worker, one Supabase project, every personal fact config.

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.deploy: cd backend && npm ci && npx wrangler deploy

VOICE_NOTES.description: R2 bucket for voice-note audio. Never public — served only through the app's session-gated route.

GALLERY.description: R2 bucket for generated images and reference photos. Never public.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Managed in-app (Secrets Store). The setup wizard writes the value — leave the placeholder at deploy time.
